water.name: Hobart Reservoir
aliases: Hobart Reservoir and tributaries and Franktown Creek downstream from Hobart Reservoir to Red House

authorities.name: U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

species.scientificName: Oncorhynchus mykiss x Oncorhynchus clarkii henshawi

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Hobart Reservoir and tributaries and Franktown Creek downstream from Hobart Reservoir to Red House: May 1 through October 31. Daily: 5 trout of which not more than 2 may be tiger trout. Possession: 10 trout of which not more than 4 may be tiger trout. Hours: 1 hour before sunrise to 2 hours after sunset.

sources.title: Hobart Reservoir — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Hobart Reservoir is located at an elevation of 7,650 feet in the Carson Range of the Toiyabe National Forest... Rainbow trout, brook trout, cutthroat trout, and bowcutt trout (rainbow x cutthroat trout hybrid) have been introduced into the lake. Brook trout are the only self-sustaining species... Hobart Reservoir will NOT be accessible from May through the Fall of 2026 due to dam repairs. During this project, the reservoir will be drained and repairs should only lead to closures for one season. Fishing should start to rebound after being restocked next season. Stocking Updates (Stocked, Species, Inches, Date Stocked, Year to Date): 497 Rainbow Trout 8.8 07-02-2025 2462; 223 Tiger Trout 9.8 07-02-2025 1681; 774 Tiger Trout 9.9 06-26-2025 1458; 684 Tiger Trout 10.3 06-26-2025 684; 1965 Rainbow Trout 9.7 07-16-2024 1965; 1010 Tiger Trout 10.7 06-24-2024 1010; 40 Brook Trout 12.0 06-19-2024 40; 935 Tiger Trout 11.2 09-26-2023 2434; 1499 Tiger Trout 10.2 07-20-2023 1499; 1012 Rainbow Trout 9.5 07-19-2023 1012

sources.title: Nev. Admin. Code § 503.504(3)(c)(2) — Western Region: restrictions on bait and lures
sources.quotedText: Only artificial lures may be used in: (1) Hinkson Slough on the Mason Valley Wildlife Management Area; and (2) Hobart Reservoir.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Hobart Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Hobart Reservoir, its tributaries, and the section of Franktown Creek from Hobart Reservoir downstream to Red House are open to fishing May 1 through October 31 only.

sub_limits.note: Of the daily/possession trout limit, only this many may be tiger trout.

parameters.counting_rule: The full limit is trout; of that limit no more than 2 daily / 4 in possession may be tiger trout.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Hobart Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 5 trout (no more than 2 tiger trout); possession limit 10 trout (no more than 4 tiger trout).
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 5 trout of which not more than 2 may be tiger trout. Possession: 10 trout of which not more than 4 may be tiger trout.

parameters.note: 1 hour before sunrise to 2 hours after sunset.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Hobart Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is permitted from 1 hour before sunrise to 2 hours after sunset at Hobart Reservoir.
regulations.verbatimText: 1 hour before sunrise to 2 hours after sunset.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used at Hobart Reservoir; no bait, including artificial bait, may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used at Hobart Reservoir; no bait.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used in: ... (2) Hobart Reservoir.

parameters.note: NDOW's water page reports Hobart Reservoir will be drained and inaccessible from May through fall 2026 for dam repairs, with fishing expected to resume the following season after restocking. This is an access/infrastructure closure reported by NDOW outside of the CR 25-16 seasons table; confirm current status with NDOW before visiting.

regulations.citation: NDOW — Hobart Reservoir water page (dam repair notice)
regulations.humanSummary: Hobart Reservoir is expected to be drained and inaccessible for fishing from May through fall 2026 due to dam repairs; verify current access before a trip.
regulations.verbatimText: Hobart Reservoir will NOT be accessible from May through the Fall of 2026 due to dam repairs. During this project, the reservoir will be drained and repairs should only lead to closures for one season. Fishing should start to rebound after being restocked next season.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
